name: documents_v2
notes: All rows are fetched (SELECT * FROM documents_v2 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC) each time the Refresh button is clicked or on component mount; the response payload is stored in this.state.documents.
Client-side filterDocuments() and sortDocuments() operate on the in-memory copy, so the database is not re-queried when the user types in the search box or changes the file-type dropdown.
